text: Yanyiama yalota, Ndangwa ya Ibale, Omukama Mpandiki
Alimu Kikole kileke batakwita egyo gashani ya Kimuli ngundu
[Yagila amajuta g'eilola limo g'ente yensigaizi amachu-]
Mugabile enjoka ilikwilagula eza Bwilagula Mafumbo
Owa Mushekya-ngabo na Kilwana owa Kikabuzi ka Nyamwanja
Majuta g'eilola limo g'ente y'ensigaizibagya babilaza amuti ogwo
Mugye mugile omukama Lugomola lwa Ibale
Gwataha emiga ya Bushagala Itongo Kafunjo
Owa Mushekya-ngabo na Kilwana owa Kikabuzi na Nyamwanja
"Omuti gwasiga ebyanda bina kutema naiwe Lugomola"
Ahi, "Ngilenta Bahamba ba Lweju lwa Mushendwa
Ohi waitu ogutumile omwa Mugasha Isheshe
Omuntu yamwita Kihanja -- yamwetonda amaihwa Kiziba
Eya mawe Nyakalembe lya Kabambagwa na Nyamwema
Ka Mukashuga na Galengaine Kihanja Malagwe na Manunga
Ahi, "Mugye mugabile Bwigula Lukwata na Lwebembela  Milombe
Ishe akaba agabile Oluhunga lwa Ndaula omunyanja."
Akaba naitila engoma y'enchencha amumwalo gwa Kilembeka
Enyungu etakachumbilaga muntu ya mawe Nyakalembe
Omuhyo gulikwela gwaluga omwa Mwizi Itongo
Entembe niko kamwani ka Mugasha Isheshe
Ekitoke yabatemela eky' Enyabwehogole mpambo ya kyoilele
Atuluke agitele engoma yange Bafa bagambilwe
Tulukya engoma yange ogitele Bafa bagambilwe
Omulanzi yahulwile Isheshe mbele ni Kile
Iwe Kile niwe mulanzi wahulwile mbele."
Ahi, "Waitu ngye ndale Mafumbo ebilo munana n'emishana munana
Ekitoke yabatemela enyabwehogola empambo ya kyolele
Gwaija Mafumbo ga Kawe Kitabi na Mujunwa
Owababumbi ba bubuya waituatali ababumbila kwokya
Lwakilangi muku naita ebilemile Lusheke mbel' enyanja okwo enjala niyo ekushagaile
Kandi eibili yakwata niho ngutu yayeho-
Olwo yamazile kugibona,ati, "Iwe Nshambi ya Ngogo."
Niwe owo olikubona nabonesa embaga yona ali aigulu
Nkabona ekitoke yatema enyabwehogola empambo ya kyolele.
Nkabona obukanda akaita emigono munana. (Yagenda zilimwo . . .)
Niyo Kyetema nibyo Bizi bya Ngogo
Yatabula ogwa ah- ogwa Nyamigongo na Kahaga(t)alwo
Ahi, "Mpa etaba eishoke ly'amabale elyo twakomile emishenga myenda ebili
Ahi kuluga ndugile omunyanja tinkanyoileo taba na gumo
Mbali yashuntamile kwikya Kaboya yataho akaiga.
Olubuga Kyenshushe niko Kashozi ka Maziba na Mayondwe
Nko kanyanja ka Bushumba omwa Lutahindwa.
Yatabula omwiga owa Kabagana bakama bange
Nigwo Muhingo gwa Buzinja na Ihangilo
Okugulu kwo yasimbile kunyukula omuti ogwo
Amaizi galugilemu niyo Kyezingola niyo Kishala
Yatema Kansinda nigo maizi ga Nkenge
Akagusimba Buzinja Bwa Nshanshame lubaju olu
Amaizi galugilemu niko kanyanja ka Buligi
Omwiga ogwatazilaho nigwo mwiga gwa Muleleizi
Yatuma okukono gumo akema Ihangilo omuntunga za Muleba
Kayaizile kuleba okwo yatema omuti ogwo
Na Kakasha n'enjoka ibembya za Nyakalando.
Yasoleza oluhanga lwalugile aho lwaija lwagoba Itongo
Mbali omukaziwe yahile eitaka lilikwela lya Kibumba
Mwaitu Ibale yakwatanisa ebiti byamalembo omw'omukama Lugomola
Omwaitu omwilembo nigwo mwiga gwa Bugonzi
Mbali yakongokeile nizo nyomyo za Mugasha
Bwelanyange yakwatanisa ebiti byamalembo namwo mw'Omuhinda
Mzee: Nkagubona mawe nkagubona. Nayanga kugamba mbali gwabaile gwemeleile
